name: DDoS Detection & Mitigation
description: Detects and responds to Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks targeting network infrastructure. Riggs AI analyzes traffic patterns to confirm the attack type (volumetric, protocol, or application-layer). Confirmed attacks trigger automated mitigation via CDN/WAF rate limiting, upstream ISP blackhole routing requests, NOC team notification, and incident ticket creation. False positives from legitimate traffic spikes are annotated and closed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Cloudflare
required_integrations.reason: Activate DDoS mitigation rules and rate limiting at the edge

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Apply emergency traffic filtering rules to mitigate attack traffic

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident ticket for NOC tracking and post-incident review

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify NOC team of active DDoS attack and mitigation status

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects abnormal traffic volume or patterns consistent with a DDoS attack

config.additional_instructions: Analyze traffic patterns to determine attack type (volumetric, protocol, application-layer). Identify source IPs/ranges, target services, and traffic volume. Distinguish from legitimate spikes.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of traffic patterns to classify the DDoS attack type, identify source ranges, and assess impact on target services
Routes based on whether Riggs AI confirmed the traffic pattern is a genuine DDoS attack versus a legitimate traffic spike

parameters.comment: DDoS mitigation activated — Attack type: {{analyze_1.threat_type}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Activates Cloudflare Under Attack mode with rate limiting to filter malicious traffic at the edge before it reaches origin servers

parameters.comment: Emergency DDoS filter — {{analyze_1.threat_type}} attack from {{analyze_1.source_count}} sources

config.description: Applies emergency firewall rules to drop traffic from identified attack source ranges and protect the targeted service
Sends critical notification to the NOC Slack channel with attack details and mitigation actions taken
Creates a P1 incident ticket in Jira for NOC tracking, post-incident review, and compliance documentation

parameters.note: Traffic spike analyzed by Riggs AI and determined to be legitimate (not DDoS). Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. Source pattern consistent with normal usage. No mitigation required.

config.description: Annotates the alert as a legitimate traffic spike and closes it when DDoS is not confirmed
DDoS detection and mitigation workflow complete
